desc: Resolve the byte-level raw m1n1 boot-object contract for self-contained Linux payloads: container/magic, alignment, load addresses, compression, autoboot selection, raw entry point 2048, safe size/expansion budget, and a host verifier for overlap/truncation/hash errors. Select direct-m1n1 or U-Boot/FIT without reading or changing APFS/Boot Policy. Experiment 5 and ticket-024 child in docs/BOOTABLE_BUILD_EXPERIMENTS.md.
author: codex
